18#ifndef MEDIA_C_PROPERTIES_H_
19#define MEDIA_C_PROPERTIES_H_
20
21#include <stdlib.h>
22#include <string.h>
23
24#include "list.h"
25#include "property.h"
26
27#ifdef __cplusplus
28extern "C" {
29#endif
30
40typedef list_t properties_t;
41
47static inline properties_t* properties_new(size_t size) { return list_new(size, sizeof(property_t)); }
48
54static inline void properties_free(properties_t* properties, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
55 if (properties != NULL) {
56 list_free(properties, free_func);
57 }
58}
59
66static inline bool properties_add(properties_t* properties, property_t* property) {
67 return list_add(properties, property);
68}
69
76static inline property_t* properties_get(const properties_t* properties, size_t index) {
77 return (property_t*)list_get(properties, index);
78}
79
85static inline size_t properties_size(const properties_t* properties) { return properties->size; }
86
92static inline size_t properties_capacity(const properties_t* properties) { return properties->capacity; }
93
99static inline bool properties_empty(const properties_t* properties) { return properties->size == 0U; }
100
107static inline property_t* properties_find(const properties_t* properties, const char* name) {
108 property_t* result = NULL;
109 for (size_t i = 0; i < properties->size; ++i) {
110 property_t* property = (property_t*)list_get(properties, i);
111 if (strcmp(property->name, name) == 0) {
112 result = property;
113 break;
114 }
115 }
116 return result;
117}
118
124static inline void properties_clear(properties_t* properties, void (*free_func)(void*)) {
125 list_clear(properties, free_func);
126}
127
136static inline properties_t* properties_duplicate(const properties_t* original) {
137 properties_t* duplicate = NULL;
138 if (original != NULL) {
139 duplicate = properties_new(properties_capacity(original));
140 if (duplicate != NULL) {
141 bool success = true;
142 for (size_t i = 0; i < properties_size(original); ++i) {
143 property_t* original_property = properties_get(original, i);
144 if (original_property == NULL) {
145 success = false;
146 break;
147 }
148
149 if (!properties_add(duplicate, original_property)) {
150 success = false;
151 break;
152 }
153 }
154 if (!success) {
155 properties_free(duplicate, NULL);
156 duplicate = NULL;
157 }
158 }
159 }
160 return duplicate;
161}
162
168static inline void properties_iterate(const properties_t* properties, void (*callback)(property_t*)) {
169 if ((properties != NULL) && (callback != NULL)) {
170 for (size_t i = 0; i < properties->size; ++i) {
171 property_t* property = (property_t*)list_get(properties, i);
172 callback(property);
173 }
174 }
175}
176
184static inline void properties_inspect(const properties_t* properties, int (*print_func)(const char*, ...),
185 const char* indent) {
186 (void)print_func("%sProperties:\n", indent);
187 char new_indent[10];
188 size_t indent_len = strlen(indent);
189 if (indent_len > (sizeof(new_indent) - 2U)) {
190 indent_len = sizeof(new_indent) - 2U;
191 }
192 (void)memcpy(new_indent, indent, indent_len);
193 new_indent[indent_len] = '\t';
194 new_indent[indent_len + 1U] = '\0';
195 for (size_t i = 0; i < properties->size; ++i) {
196 const property_t* property = properties_get(properties, i);
197 property_print(property, print_func, new_indent);
198 }
199}
200
201#ifdef __cplusplus
202}
203#endif
204
205#endif // MEDIA_C_PROPERTIES_H_

Generic dynamic array (list) container.

static bool list_add(list_t *list, void *item)
Append an item to the list, growing it if necessary.
